latin: Agricola vocem in agro suo audivit susurrantem: 'si id aedificaveris, ille veniet.' itaque in medio frumento campum ludendi construxit.

questions.target: A whispering voice in his field
choices: A whispering voice in his field

questions.target: A playing field in the middle of his crops
choices: A playing field in the middle of his crops

translation: A farmer heard a voice whispering in his field: 'If you build it, he will come.' And so he built a playing field in the middle of the grain.
